name: Brain of the Golem
description: Notes This prism has a long duration (7 seconds) while costing 15 mana less that the tiered prism with the same duration, making this prism fairly efficient.
effects: No teleport; summons a stationary golem decoy that explodes at the end of its duration Explosion: Dazed for 2 seconds on enemies within 1.75 tiles; 0 damage
